continue.text: Invest in optimizing sprint effective (process) time
Focus on stability and performance as a high priority guiding objective
Monitor and Tweak team performance metrics

start.text: Show trends in the sprint updates
Figure out how to contribute to other team's "source" without becoming the owner of such codebase. (through the completion of a PR)
Create Team Playbook (SEL + all functional teams)
Define top/real value metrics for our teams and our collective ability to demonstrate effectiveness
Lead "Experity Literacy" efforts, by scheduling activities and sharing knowledge about our systems proactively.
Shift left by automating quality within the development tasks

stop.text: Waiting for explicit direction before acting on improvements, efficiencies and initiatives
Throwing the ownership of quality over the wall to QA.
